blocks.text: Four CL first legs tonight — Glimt make history tomorrow
Barcelona arrive at St. James' Park on the back of a 1-0 win at Athletic Club. Newcastle's fairytale Champions League run meets its stiffest test yet — Howe's side will back themselves on home soil.
⚽ Tottenham at Atlético Madrid — 21:00, Simeone's defensive fortress hosts Spurs in the fourth first leg

blocks.label: 🏆 Wednesday CL — Four More First Legs
items: ⚽ 21:00 Bodø/Glimt vs Sporting CP — the biggest game in Norwegian club football history, Aspmyra 🇳🇴 ★★★★★
⚽ 21:00 Real Madrid vs Manchester City — the defining CL rivalry returns to the Bernabéu ★★★★★
⚽ 18:45 Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen — Premier League leaders take on Xabi's men in Germany ★★★★
⚽ 21:00 PSG vs Chelsea — Parc des Princes glamour clash ★★★★
